mapper.select: SELECT CONTRACT_NUM || '|' || CUSTOMER_ID || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS_RSN_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_NAME, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(NCN, '') || '|' || NVL(NCN_GRADE, '') || '|' || NVL(IMSI, '') || '|' || NVL(ICC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(G3_IND, '') || '|' || NVL(DEALER_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(LST_DEV_CHG_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(ITNET_BAL_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(IMEI, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS_LAST_ACTV_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SLS_CMPN_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(INTM_SRL_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(WIBRO_IMEI, '') || '|' || NVL(WIBRO_MAC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(USIM_FXD_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(CNTR_USE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SVC_CNTR_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(REAL_USE_CUST_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(SRL_IF_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(UNPD_IND_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(MNP_IND_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(INDV_ENTR_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(INDV_ENTR_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(SCAN_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(ON_OFF_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(DOBYYYYMMDD, '') || '|' || NVL(BAN, '') || '|' || NVL(WIFI_MAC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(OPEN_AGNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(PPPO, '') || '|' || NVL(PROD_TYPE, '') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A WHERE A.EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000'

SELECT CONTRACT_NUM || '|' || NVL(CUSTOMER_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS_RSN_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_NAME, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(NCN, '') || '|' || NVL(NCN_GRADE, '') || '|' || NVL(IMSI, '') || '|' || NVL(ICC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(G3_IND, '') || '|' || NVL(DEALER_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(LST_DEV_CHG_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(ITNET_BAL_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(IMEI, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS_LAST_ACTV_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SLS_CMPN_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(INTM_SRL_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(WIBRO_IMEI, '') || '|' || NVL(WIBRO_MAC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(USIM_FXD_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(CNTR_USE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SVC_CNTR_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(REAL_USE_CUST_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(SRL_IF_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(UNPD_IND_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(MNP_IND_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(INDV_ENTR_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(INDV_ENTR_NM, '') || '|' || EVNT_CD || '|' || EVNT_TRTM_NO || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(SOC, '') || '|' || NVL(ON_OFF_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(DOBYYYYMMDD, '') || '|' || EVNT_CHANGE_DATE || '|' || NVL(WIFI_MAC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(BAN, '') || '|' || NVL(OPEN_AGNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(PPPO, '') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST A WHERE EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000'

SELECT CONTRACT_NUM || '|' || SOC || '|' || APP_END_DATE || '|' || FEATURE_CODE || '|' || NVL(SERVICE_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(EFFECTIVE_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(EXPIRATION_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(SOC_CCR_DISPLAY_IND, '') || '|' || NVL(INBH_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(DEALER_CODE, '') || '|' || EVNT_CD || '|' || EVNT_TRTM_NO || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(APP_START_DD, '') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO A WHERE A.EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000'

SELECT CONTRACT_NUM || '|' || MODEL_TYPE || '|' || APP_END_DATE || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(DEALER_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_NO, '') || '|' || MODEL_ID || '|' || NVL(MODEL_NM, '') || '|' || INTM_SRL_NO || '|' || NVL(EVNT_STR, '') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO A WHERE A.EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000'

SELECT CONTRACT_NUM || '|' || NVL(SALORG_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(OPEN_SHOP_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(TRRM_SHOP_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(CNTPNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SLS_PRSN_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(TRTM_PRSN_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(ENCR_PRSN_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(SLS_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(DVC_OFW_AMNT, 0) || '|' || NVL(INST_ORGIN_AMNT, 0) || '|' || NVL(INST_MNTH_CNT, '0') || '|' || EVNT_CD || '|' || EVNT_TRTM_NO || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(APP_START_DD, '') || '|' || APP_END_DATE || '|' || NVL(MODEL_NAME, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(ENGG_MNTH_CNT, '0') || '|' || SVC_CNTR_NO || '|' || NVL(GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_CHN_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(BL_DC_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(GRNT_INSR_STAT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SIM_START_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(SIM_END_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(SIM_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(REG_DTTM, '') || '|' || NVL(SBSCST_IMPS_EXMP_AMNT, 0) || '|' || NVL(AGNC_SUPOT_DSCN_AMNT, 0) || '|' || NVL(USIM_AMNT, 0) || '|' || NVL(KD_SUPOT_DSCN_AMNT, 0) AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO A WHERE A.EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000'

SELECT RATE_CD || '|' || APPL_END_DT || '|' || NVL(APPL_STRT_DT, '') || '|' || RATE_NM || '|' || NVL(RATE_GRP_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(PAY_CL_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(RATE_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(DATA_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(BASE_AMT, '') || '|' || NVL(FREE_CALL_CL_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(FREE_CALL_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(NW_IN_CALL_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(NW_OUT_CALL_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(FREE_SMS_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(FREE_DATA_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(ONLINE_TYPE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(AL_FLAG, '') || '|' || NVL(SERVICE_TYPE, '') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_RATE_MST A
SELECT RATE_CD || '|' || AGRM_TRM || '|' || NVL(DC_AMT, '') || '|' || NVL(SPRT_TP, '') || '|' || APPL_END_DTTM || '|' || NVL(APPL_STRT_DTTM, '') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_RATE_SPEC A

SELECT CONTRACT_NUM || '|' || CUSTOMER_ID || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS_RSN_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_NAME, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(NCN, '') || '|' || NVL(NCN_GRADE, '') || '|' || NVL(IMSI, '') || '|' || NVL(ICC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(G3_IND, '') || '|' || NVL(DEALER_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(LST_DEV_CHG_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(ITNET_BAL_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(IMEI, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS_LAST_ACTV_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SLS_CMPN_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(INTM_SRL_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(WIBRO_IMEI, '') || '|' || NVL(WIBRO_MAC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(USIM_FXD_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(CNTR_USE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SVC_CNTR_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(REAL_USE_CUST_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(SRL_IF_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(UNPD_IND_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(MNP_IND_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(INDV_ENTR_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(INDV_ENTR_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(SCAN_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(ON_OFF_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(DOBYYYYMMDD, '') || '|' || NVL(BAN, '') || '|' || NVL(WIFI_MAC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(OPEN_AGNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(PPPO, '') || '|' || NVL(PROD_TYPE, '') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A WHERE A.EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01000000'

SELECT ORGN_ID || '|' || NVL(ORGN_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(KT_ORG_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(HGHR_ORGN_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(ORGN_STAT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(ORGN_GRD, '') || '|' || NVL(TYPE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(TYPE_DTL_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(TYPE_DTL_CD1, '') || '|' || NVL(TYPE_DTL_CD2, '') || '|' || NVL(TYPE_DTL_CD3, '') || '|' || NVL(ORGN_LVL_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_STRT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(APPL_STRT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(APPL_CMPLT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(TAXBILL_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(CMSN_PRVD_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(HNDST_INVTR_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(CLOSE_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(LOGIS_CNTER_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(HNDST_ORD_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(BIZ_TYPE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(BIZ_REG_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(CORP_REG_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(BIZ_CAT, '') || '|' || NVL(BIZ_CON, '') || '|' || NVL(RESPN_PRSN_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(RESPN_PRSN_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(RESPN_PRSN_MBLPHN, '') || '|' || NVL(RESPN_PRSN_EMAIL, '') || '|' || NVL(TMNT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(RESPN_PRSN_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(SPECIAL_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(USE_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(OLD_ORGN_ID, '') AS STR_VAL FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST A WHERE TYPE_CD = '20'

SELECT PRDT_ID || '|' || PRDT_SRL_NUM || '|' || OLD_YN || '|' || ORGN_ID || '|' || NVL(IMEI, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_SRL_NUM_FMT, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_PRPOS_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(LAST_INOUT_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_STAT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SUPLY_CPNY_ORD_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(LAST_CHNG_HST_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(LOGIS_PROC_STAT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(MYCPNY_REQ_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_COLR_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SVC_PROC_STAT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(INPUT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_TYPE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(CRE_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(WIFI_MAC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(SVC_CT_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(SVC_OPEN_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(SVC_OPEN_TM, '') || '|' || NVL(ESN, '') || '|' || NVL(CERT_KEY, '') || '|' || NVL(TCN_STD_CNFM_CERTNO, '') || '|' || NVL(WIBRO_IMEI, '') || '|' || NVL(FIXED_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(RFNO, '') || '|' || NVL(NAMING, '') || '|' || NVL(NSN, '') || '|' || NVL(WIBRO_MAC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(INVTR_DAY_CNT, 0) || '|' || NVL(IN_UNIT_PRICE, 0) || '|' || NVL(IN_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(OUT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(OUT_UNIT_PRICE, 0) || '|' || NVL(RPRS_PRDT_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(PD_ORGN_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(SUPLY_MNFCT_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(IF_QUE_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(SLS_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(CAN_DT, '') AS STR_VAL FROM LGS_PRDT_SRL_MST A WHERE A.REG_DTTM >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') OR A.CHNG_DTTM >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')

SELECT PRDT_ID || '|' || RPRS_PRDT_ID || '|' || RPRS_YN || '|' || NVL(PRDT_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_TYPE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_IND_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_COLR_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(MNFCT_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_LNCH_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_DT, '') AS STR_VAL FROM CMN_INTM_MDL

SELECT A.BILL_PYMN_SEQ_NUM || '|' || A.FILE_NM || '|' || NVL(A.BILL_YM, '') || '|' || NVL(A.SVC_CNTR_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(A.BILL_ACNT_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(A.SLS_CMPN_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(A.DUEDAT_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(A.APLY_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(A.BLPYM_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(A.PYMN_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(A.BILL_ITEM_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(A.ITEM_CD_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(A.PYMN_MTHD_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(A.PYMN_MTHD_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(A.PYMN_DTL_MTHD_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(A.PYMN_DTL_MTHD_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(A.PYMN_AGNC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(A.ADJS_RSN_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(A.ADJS_RSN_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(A.BILL_RFLC_IND_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(A.PYMN_AMNT, '0') || '|' || NVL(A.VAT_AMNT, '0') AS STR_VAL FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA A WHERE REGEXP_REPLACE(FILE_NM, '[^[:digit:]]') > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '10' AND A.BILL_ITEM_CD IN ( 'EQIST', 'EQISV' )

SELECT RPRS_PRDT_ID || '|' || OLD_YN || '|' || UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM || '|' || UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM || '|' || OUT_UNIT_PRIC || '|' || NVL(MNFCT_GRANT, '') || '|' || NVL(REMRK, '') AS STR_VAL FROM CMN_HNDST_AMT WHERE REG_DTTM >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') OR RVISN_DTTM >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')

SELECT NVL(RATE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(OLD_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(AGRM_TRM, '') || '|' || NVL(OPER_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(APPL_END_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(APPL_STRT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(SUBSD_AMT, '0') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_OFCL_SUBSD_MST WHERE REGST_DTTM >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') OR RVISN_DTTM >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')

SELECT NVL(REQUEST_KEY, '') || '|' || NVL(CONTRACT_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(AGENT_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(SERVICE_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(OPER_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(PSTATE, '') || '|' || NVL(REQ_BUY_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(REQ_MODEL_NAME, '') || '|' || NVL(REQ_PHONE_SN, '') || '|' || NVL(REQ_USIM_SN, '') || '|' || DECODE(SYS_RDATE, NULL, '', TO_CHAR(SYS_RDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) || '|' || DECODE(REQ_IN_DAY, NULL, '', TO_CHAR(REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) || '|' || DECODE(OPEN_REQ_DATE, NULL, '', TO_CHAR(OPEN_REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) || '|' || NVL(CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(PROD_ID, '') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_REQUEST WHERE SYS_RDATE >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')

SELECT CONTRACT_NUM || '|' || APPL_END_DTTM || '|' || EVNT_TRTM_NO || '|' || MODEL_ID || '|' || INTM_SRL_NO || '|' || APPL_STRT_DTTM || '|' || AGNT_CD || '|' || SVC_CNTR_NO || '|' || MODEL_NM || '|' || EVNT_CD || '|' || MODEL_CHN_CD || '|' || TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || '|' || REQUEST_KEY FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST WHERE APPL_STRT_DTTM >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000'
